introSection: Man-O-War is a steel roller coaster located at Mysterious Island in Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is the only S&S Worldwide Screaming Squirrel installation still standing, but it has not operated since 2024 or earlier. From opening until 2013, the attraction was known as Screamin Squirrel.
fullText: Man-O-War is a steel roller coaster located at Mysterious Island in Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is the only S&S Worldwide Screaming Squirrel installation still standing, but it has not operated since 2024 or earlier. From opening until 2013, the attraction was known as Screamin Squirrel.
